calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2026 Continued To Jul-01-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2026 Continued To Apr-01-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

NOTICE OF APPLICATION OF WRIT OF POSSESSION AND HEARING Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-02-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF FINANCIAL PACIFIC LEASING, INC.'S APPLICATION OF WRIT OF POSSESSION AND HEARING.

The unopposed motion for writ of possession is granted. The court finds that plaintiff has established the probable validity of the claim. The court finds that defendant has no interest in the property after taking into account the amount due and owing on the equipment finance agreement and does not order an undertaking.

Moving party is ordered to prepare a proposed order that conforms to Code of Civil Procedure, sections 512.070 and 512.080, send it to the defendant for review (Rule of Court 3.1312), and then submit it to the court for signature.

Proposed order received.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
